description: Claude searches real job boards, scores each job 0-100 for fit, and shows a ranked board.
name: io.github.Servation/job-search-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the per-user data file path (defaults to ~/.job-search-mcp/jobs.json).
environmentVariables.name: JOB_SEARCH_MCP_DATA

environmentVariables.description: Optional: your logged-in LinkedIn li_at cookie, for richer/Premium LinkedIn data instead of guest mode. Against LinkedIn's ToS; see README.
environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_LI_AT

environmentVariables.description: Optional: your logged-in LinkedIn JSESSIONID cookie, paired with LINKEDIN_LI_AT for Premium mode.
environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_JSESSIONID

title: Job Search MCP
